problem: Blood banks need reliable pre-transfusion testing systems to ensure blood type compatibility and detect antibodies, preventing potentially fatal transfusion reactions. Manual testing is slow, error-prone, and difficult to standardize.
solution: Automated blood typing and antibody screening systems with integrated software for pre-transfusion testing. Their IH-1000 system automates immunohematology testing with barcode tracking, results management, and connectivity to laboratory information systems for improved patient safety.
